component.name: GlobalProtect
component.summary: Connect to GlobalProtect VPN with smart cards

description.p: An unprivileged graphical client for GlobalProtect VPN, built on OpenConnect. It adds smart-card / PKCS#11 (YubiKey PIV) certificate authentication for the portal and gateway, alongside SAML single sign-on and username/password.
The GUI runs sandboxed and drives a privileged host service over D-Bus to bring up the tunnel. Saved connection identities are kept in an encrypted vault, optionally unlocked from your keyring.
This is a community fork of yuezk/GlobalProtect-openconnect, distributed under the GPL-3.0.
Initial fork release: smart-card prelogin, Tauri GUI, tray client.
